site.name: BrightPath Academy
site.tagline: Where children grow, learn, and discover
site.description: A modern center for gymnastics, English, theatre, robotics, and creative development for children ages 3 to 16 in Yerevan.

home.heroLede: A modern center for gymnastics, English, theatre, robotics, and creative development. Six programs designed by educators who believe great teaching feels like play.
home.statsLabel: families learning with us this year
home.programsLede: Small groups, expert teachers, and a curriculum that grows with your child.
home.whyLede: Twelve years of practice with one quiet promise: every child is met where they are.

whyPoints.title: Small groups
whyPoints.text: Eight to twelve children per class. Every voice has room to grow.

whyPoints.title: Certified coaches
whyPoints.text: Specialists in early years, sport, language, and engineering, not generalists.

whyPoints.title: Honest progress
whyPoints.text: Termly reports written like a conversation, not a school report card.

whyPoints.title: A real building
whyPoints.text: A bright studio in central Yerevan, designed by people who watch children all day.

home.ctaBandLede: Pick a program, send a quick note, and we will reply within one working day.

programs.title: Programs
programs.lede: Six programs across movement, language, expression, and engineering.

gymnastics.title: Gymnastics
gymnastics.summary: Strength, flexibility, and confidence on the mat, taught by certified coaches in a bright, modern gym.

development.title: Creative Development
development.summary: Cognitive, motor, and social development for ages 3 to 7, the foundation for every program that follows.

english.title: English
english.summary: Communicative English from first words to fluency. Speaking-first lessons, real progress.

theatre.title: Theatre
theatre.summary: A theatre program that turns shy whispers into clear, confident voices, ending every term in a real performance.

schoolPrep.title: School Preparation
schoolPrep.summary: A calm, thorough year that gets children ready for school, not just academically but in every way.

robotics.title: Robotics
robotics.summary: Hands-on coding, circuits, and real engineering, from LEGO Mindstorms to Python and Arduino.

gymnastics.title: Gymnastics
gymnastics.heroTitle: Strength, balance, courage, on the mat.
gymnastics.heroLede: From first forward roll to confident competition, a real gymnastics program in central Yerevan.
gymnastics.ctaLede: Send a message and we will book you a slot in the right group.

development.title: Creative Development
development.heroTitle: The first years are the foundation.
development.heroLede: Cognitive and motor development for ages 3 to 7, the foundation for every program that follows.

pillars.title: Curiosity
pillars.text: Asking, watching, wondering. The starting point of every lesson.

pillars.title: Movement
pillars.text: Fine and gross motor work woven into the day, threading, cutting, climbing, balancing, without drills or pressure.

pillars.title: Expression
pillars.text: Drawing, building, telling stories. Many ways to be understood.

pillars.title: Together
pillars.text: Listening, taking turns, repairing a small disagreement. The skills of being with others.

english.title: English
english.heroTitle: English that comes out of your mouth, not just your textbook.
english.heroLede: Communicative English from first words to fluency. Speaking-first lessons with grammar woven through.
english.ctaLede: Twenty quick minutes with one of our teachers, written and spoken.

theatre.title: Theatre
theatre.heroTitle: Voice, presence, and the joy of being heard.
theatre.heroLede: A theatre program that turns shy whispers into clear, confident voices, ending every term in a real performance.
theatre.ctaLede: No experience needed, just a child who would like to try. Send us a message and we will book a workshop.

schoolPrep.title: School Preparation
schoolPrep.heroTitle: Ready for school, in every sense.
schoolPrep.heroLede: A calm, thorough year that gets children ready for school, not just academically but in every way.
schoolPrep.outcomesTitle: By June, every graduate has these in place
schoolPrep.ctaLede: Come for a parent visit. We will walk you through a typical morning.

robotics.title: Robotics
robotics.heroTitle: Build it, code it, watch it work.
robotics.heroLede: From LEGO Mindstorms to Arduino and Python, three levels that build serious skill through serious projects.
robotics.ctaLede: Saturday open hours, 11:00 to 13:00. No appointment needed.

about.title: About BrightPath
about.heroTitle: A neighbourhood center, built by teachers.
about.heroLede: Twelve years, six programs, one bright building in central Yerevan.
about.missionText: To give every child a place where curiosity is the lesson plan, and where teachers are paid, trusted, and respected like the professionals they are.
about.visionText: A generation of children who walk into school confident, curious, and kind, because someone outside the classroom showed up for them too.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.lede: Most parents ask the same things. Here are honest answers.
faq.emptyState: No questions match your search yet. Try different words, or write to us directly.
faq.ctaLede: Write to us, we reply within one working day.

blog.title: Stories, ideas, and notes from the studio.
blog.lede: Practical pieces from our teachers and coaches, for parents, by people who spend the day with kids.

contact.title: Let's start the conversation.
contact.lede: Send a message, book a trial class, or just ask a question. We will get back within one working day.

form.successText: Your message is on its way. We will reply within one working day.
form.errorText: Please try again, or write to us directly at hello@brightpath.am.

errors.name: Please tell us your name.
errors.phone: Please share a phone number we can reach you on.
errors.age: Please enter an age between 3 and 16.

footer.tagline: Where children grow, learn, and discover.
